text: Epstein hosted Ehud Barak, Steve Bannon, and 'Miro' for dinner at his NYC townhouse, March 22, 2018
Deepak Chopra met Epstein at his NYC home at 10am, March 23, 2018
Epstein traveled to Paris March 31 - April 7, 2018, per his personal schedule email
FBI arrests Jeffrey Epstein at Teterboro Airport on sex trafficking charges involving dozens of minor girls, 2002-2005
FBI New York and Boston offices arrest Ghislaine Maxwell at her Bradford, NH property on July 2, 2020
